title: Community and Engagement Survey
body: "The Community and Engagement Survey  The Community and Engagement Survey (CES) is a continuous push to web survey of adults aged 16 and over in England, with paper surveys available for those not digitally engaged or wishing to complete online. Verian is carrying out the survey on behalf of the Department for Culture, Media and Sport (DCMS).   The CES has been designed to explore how people across England engage with their community and with culture, media and live sport and allows respondents’ views to be heard on a range of issues affecting their local area. The findings will help Government, charities and other public sector organisations understand how people engage with culture, media and a range of activities, as well as understand more about communities across England. It will help inform and shape policy and decision making.   The CES replaces DCMS’ Participation Survey and Community Life Survey and runs as a joint survey in practice. This was in response to a public consultation about DCMS’ social surveys run in 2024. The content for the CES has been kept broadly similar to the previous surveys but combining the surveys will result in efficiencies and more coherent outputs. This approach provides an opportunity to ask a small number of survey questions to the full sample across both question sets - for example in 2025/26 the Community Life Survey questions was asked of a sample of 175,000 whilst the Participation Survey questions was asked of a sample of 33,000. A combined module of questions, comprising questions from both survey sets, was asked of the full sample of 208,000.  This means that Local Authority (LA) level data is available for a small number of Participation Survey questions  (and, in future, vice versa in any future year where we collect LA-level data for the Participation Survey but not the Community Life Survey).  Fieldwork for the CES began in October 2025. Fieldwork for the Community Life Survey questions in 2025/26 will be delivered over two quarters (October to December 2025 and January to March 2026) due to additional survey setup requirements. The fieldwork for the Participation Survey questions in 2025/26 began in April 2025 as part of the Participation Survey fieldwork until September 2025. The Participation Survey questions will continue to be asked as part of the CES from October 2025 until March 2026. As such there are two quarterly CES publications in 2025/26, in addition to an annual publication, which covers the period of October 2025 to March 2026 (for Community Life Survey questions) and April 2025 and March 2026 (for Participation Survey questions).  In 2025/26, DCMS partnered with the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government (MHCLG) to boost the sample size to be able to produce meaningful estimates at the Local Authority (LA) level for the majority of the data for the Community Life Survey questions.   The questionnaire for 2025/26 has been developed collaboratively to adapt to the needs and interests of both DCMS and MHCLG.
